---
name: e2e-api-conventions
description: API E2E authoring conventions. Injected when the agent touches API test files, so API work never receives UI page-object rules and vice versa.
paths:
  - "data/**"
  - "suites/**/*.spec.js"
  - "suites/**/*.spec.ts"
  - "workspace/tests/e2e-api-tests-1/data/**"
  - "workspace/tests/e2e-api-tests-1/suites/**"
  - "workspace/tests/e2e-api-tests-2/suites/**"
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by bin/gen_path_skills.py — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.
     Conventions live in skills/e2e-api-conventions/SKILL.md;
     the path globs are derived from registry test_repositories. -->
# API E2E Conventions
- Use the shared request client in suites/_lib/client.ts (auth, base URL, tracing).
- Assert: status, response schema (zod schemas in suites/_lib/schemas/), and the
  specific business fields the scenario targets — not whole-body snapshots.
- Negative cases: invalid payload, authz failure, and boundary values for every
  mutating endpoint touched.
- Idempotent setup/teardown via API, never via UI.
